hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); echo "$INPUT" | grep -q 'git commit' && { cd /Users/octiv/Octiv_MVP && echo '[PreCommit] Running blackboard tests...' && node --test --test-timeout=10000 test/blackboard.test.js 2>&1 | tail -5; } || true

MEM_DIR=/Users/octiv/.claude/projects/-Users-octiv-Octiv-MVP/memory; TS=$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M'); echo "## Auto-save before compaction — $TS" >> $MEM_DIR/session-log.md && echo "- Last commit: $(git -C /Users/octiv/Octiv_MVP log --oneline -1 2>/dev/null)" >> $MEM_DIR/session-log.md && echo "- Modified: $(git -C /Users/octiv/Octiv_MVP diff --name-only 2>/dev/null | tr '\n' ', ')" >> $MEM_DIR/session-log.md && echo '[PreCompact] Memory auto-saved to session-log.md'
